name: SpiceJet Limited
summary: SpiceJet Limited provides air transportation services. It operates through Air Transport, and Freighter and Logistics Services segments. The company offers passengers and cargo air transportation services under the SpiceJet brand name. As of October 31, 2020, it operated 105 fleets covering 57 routes, which include 47 domestic and 10 international destinations. SpiceJet Limited was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Gurugram, India.
